title: Iran’s New Security Chief Is a Hard-Line Former Guards Commander
summary_full: Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr replaces Ali Larijani, who was killed last week in an Israeli strike. He has a history of expanding the Guards’ reach into Iran’s politics.
summary_public: Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr replaces Ali Larijani, who was killed last week in an Israeli strike. He has a history of expanding the Guards’ reach into Iran’s politics.

IL.label: neutral
IL.evidence: killed last week in an Israeli strike
